title: After the Yasuda Kinen: My Kind of Courage

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: The wind...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
It was so warm. So gentle and soft. But it felt
strong, too, like it was pushing me forward.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Together, she and the wind blew straight past me.
Almost as if trying to show me the way...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Tell me, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: What are you thinking about right now?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Uh... Um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I wanted to give you some courage.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Courage?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...I have a dream. I want my running to create a
brighter future for someone I care about.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: A brighter future...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: If I keep working really hard, and I do really well, I'm sure I can help them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But in order to do that... I need to climb over the
walls in my way.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm still working on it, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That person gave me courage, and because of
that, my running improved!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I thought if you saw me running at my best, you
might be inspired in the same way I was.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Or at least... that's what I was hoping...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh dear.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... It just sounded a lot grander in words than
it did in my head.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Really? I understand what you mean, though.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
On the turf, I realized once again how strong and
kind you are—how sweet the scent is that you
carry upon your breeze.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: That's why I want to thank you.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Today's breeze felt nice. Better than usual. I felt it
carrying me along its currents...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Flower, I...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to become one with the wind and fly
through those 2,000 meters.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
But before that... I'm going to repay you for the
courage you've given me.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: And I'll do it in the same way you did for me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Do you mean...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure the wind reaches you at the
Sprinters Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
It'll be a gale that cuts a path to the future. I
hope you'll look forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I will!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Zephyr seems like she's in a better mood. What a
relief.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: We both said we'd do our best at—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! I got swept up in her declaration without
realizing it!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! I agreed to run in the Sprinters Stakes
without talking to you first!
choice_data_list: It's okay—I already planned on it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ooh! In that case...
choice_data_list: Yup! The Sprinters Stakes is our next stop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's where she shines at her brightest, and I want
her present self to win in the same place she ran
so well at last year.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
By the way, am I not going to try for
medium-distance races?
choice_data_list: That'll depend on how things go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The western Grand Prix—the Takarazuka
Kinen—will be taking place soon after. If training
goes well, we may be able to consider running in
it too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll put everything I've got into the Sprinters
Stakes, then.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
When I was feeling lost during last year's Sprinters
Stakes, you helped lead me back onto the right
path.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was able to run really well because I trusted you
so much.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If I can run even better this time and get first
place, then...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best at the Sprinters Stakes, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm going to gift you with first place!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Welcome, little cosmos. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: These flowers have grown so much...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: All right! I can do this!
